column1: Online-only Table 1: Information captured in the data template relating to meta-data

column3: Title of the article the data was published in. If unpublished then NA or “Unpublished”
The year the article was published (NA if unpublished)
The surname of the first author of the article
The surname of the corresponding author of the article
The journal the article was published in (NA if unpublished)
The DOI of the article (NA if not available or unpublished)
The DOI of the data (if different from the article, NA if not available)
The total number of studies in the file
The total number of sites across all studies in the file
The total number of species in the dataset (if given)
Was the entire earthworm community sampled, or just selected species. If this information is unknown or unclear NA is given
Was the data taken from the paper, or did the author provide raw values
Were any other soil organisms sampled at the same sites
